001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.CollectedFossilDao;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil;
007import jakarta.inject.Inject;
008import java.util.List;
009import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
010
011/**
012 * Implementation of {@link CollectedFossilRepository} that delegates to the corresponding DAO for
013 * database operations.
014 */
015public class CollectedFossilRepositoryImpl implements CollectedFossilRepository {
016
017  private final CollectedFossilDao collectedFossilDao;
018
019  /**
020   * Constructs a CollectedFossilRepositoryImpl with the specified DAO.
021   *
022   * @param collectedFossilDao DAO for database operations.
023   */
024  @Inject
025  CollectedFossilRepositoryImpl(CollectedFossilDao collectedFossilDao) {
026    this.collectedFossilDao = collectedFossilDao;
027  }
028
029  @Override
030  public LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllOrderByDateCollectedDesc(long userId) {
031    return collectedFossilDao.getAllCollectedFossilsForUserOrderByDate(userId);
032  }
033
034  @Override
035  public LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllByFavoriteStateOrderByDateCollectedDesc(
036      long userId, boolean favorite) {
037    return collectedFossilDao.getCollectedFossilsByUserAndFavoriteOrderByDate(userId, favorite);
038  }
039
040  @Override
041  public CompletableFuture<Long> insert(CollectedFossil collectedFossil) {
042    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> collectedFossilDao.insert(collectedFossil));
043  }
044
045  @Override
046  public CompletableFuture<Boolean> setFossil(CollectedFossil collectedFossil, Fossil fossil) {
047    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
048      collectedFossil.setFossilStatsId(fossil.getId());
049      int updated = collectedFossilDao.update(collectedFossil);
050      return updated > 0;
051    });
052  }
053
054  @Override
055  public CompletableFuture<Boolean> setFavoriteState(CollectedFossil collectedFossil,
056      boolean favoriteState) {
057    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
058      collectedFossil.setFavorite(favoriteState);
059      int updated = collectedFossilDao.update(collectedFossil);
060      return updated > 0;
061    });
062  }
063
064  @Override
065  public CompletableFuture<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllWithoutFossil(long userId) {
066    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(
067        () -> collectedFossilDao.getAllWithoutFossilForUser(userId));
068  }
069}
